overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic horror game (Alan Wake 2) featuring a character navigating a dark industrial underground facility illuminated by intense red emergency lighting. The character explores a narrow metal corridor, enters a secured storage room through a metal gate, and engages in supernatural combat with a shadowy entity using a flashlight and firearm.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial maintenance corridor with red emergency lighting

agents.ego_description: cautiously walking through the narrow industrial corridor, sweeping flashlight across metal walkways and red-lit walls

entered.detail: vertical red glow sticks emitting intense crimson light along the walkway
rusted metal grating floor with visible gaps and industrial texture
rough concrete walls with pipes and industrial fixtures
large metal barred gate blocking the corridor end

segments.scene_description: The character navigates a claustrophobic industrial corridor bathed in intense red emergency lighting. Metal walkways and concrete walls line the path, leading toward a security gate at the corridor's end.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition through security gate into storage room

events.description: character opens metal security gate and steps from red-lit corridor into dimly lit storage room

agents.ego_description: pushing open the metal security gate and stepping through the doorway into the inner storage area

entered.detail: dimly lit room with concrete floors and scattered industrial debris
stacked cardboard boxes and storage containers
tall metal shelving racks against the left wall

segments.scene_description: The character transitions through the metal security gate from the red-lit corridor into a storage room filled with cardboard boxes and metal shelving. The lighting shifts from intense red to dimmer mixed tones as the gate closes behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial storage room with supernatural combat

events.description: shadowy humanoid enemy materializes and lunges toward the character
character uses flashlight beam to burn and dissolve the shadow entity
character is knocked backward and falls to the ground after defeating the enemy

agents.ego_description: engaging in close-quarters combat with the shadow entity, using flashlight to burn away its darkness followed by a firearm

notable_agents.action: shadowy enemy lunging aggressively toward the character before dissolving into light particles

entered.detail: humanoid figure composed of dark shadowy particles with glowing eyes

segments.scene_description: Inside the storage room, a shadowy entity attacks the character. The character uses a flashlight to burn away the darkness, causing the enemy to dissolve into sparkling light particles. The force of the encounter knocks the character backward onto the floor as the combat concludes.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a claustrophobic industrial facility that shifts from a red-lit corridor into a chaotic supernatural encounter within a storage room. It begins with the character navigating a narrow path of metal walkways and concrete walls bathed in intense red emergency lighting. As the character reaches the end of the hall, the camera follows them through a metal security gate, where the lighting transitions from the vivid red glow to dimmer, mixed tones among cardboard boxes and metal shelving. The scene then shifts into a sudden confrontation as a shadowy entity attacks, prompting the character to use a flashlight to dissolve the creature into sparkling light particles. Finally, the force of the combat knocks the character backward onto the floor as the encounter concludes.
